_source: Journal abbreviation -> full title. The core list is the authoritative Reviews of Modern Physics Style Guide, Appendix B (Table XI, 'Journal titles and abbreviations'); modern journals not in that 2001 table, and common bibcode/INSPIRE acronyms (ApJ, MNRAS, A&A, ...), are appended. Each key is an abbreviation (lowercased, periods kept for reference; matching is period- and case-insensitive); the value is the full title. The ISO-4 word-prefix fallback in compare.py handles forms not listed here.
